mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payments WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments(order_id, trade_id, channel, amount, status, paid_at, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{tradeId}, #{channel}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{paidAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE payments SET status = #{status}, paid_at = #{paidAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE trade_id = #{tradeId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE payments SET status = #{status}, paid_at = #{paidAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalPayments, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingPayments, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS successPayments, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failedPayments, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS paidAmount FROM payments

SELECT id, order_id AS orderId, trade_id AS tradeId, channel, amount, status, paid_at AS paidAt, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM payments ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
